root_cause_summary: The contract creation request omitted the required starting_at field.
root_cause_details: The request body included customer_id but did not include starting_at, which is required by the contract creation operation.
resolution_summary: Added starting_at to the request body and confirmed the request advanced past required-field validation.
resolution_steps: Compared the request body with the Create a contract required fields.
Added starting_at to the contract creation payload.
Replayed the request with a valid ISO timestamp.
verification_steps: Verify the API no longer returns the missing-field error.
Verify the contract create request reaches normal contract validation.
verification_results: The missing-field error was no longer returned.
The customer confirmed the corrected payload resolved the validation issue.
